title: lepigonum liebmannianum
intro: Lepigonum liebmannianum, also known as the Mexican tree heen, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It is a shrub or small tree with fragrant leaves and small white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to alleviate fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems. Lepigonum liebmannianum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or essential oil, which can be used to treat various health issues, including infections, wounds, and skin conditions.
